texto: Sex isn't good unless it means something. It doesn't necessarily need to mean "love" and it doesn't necessarily need to happen in a relationship, but it does need to mean intimacy and connection...There exists a very fine line between being sexually liberated and being sexually used.
explicacao: Citação de Laura Sessions Stepp sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Sex isn't good unless it means something. It doesn't necessarily need to mean "love" and it doesn…” articula reflexao, love, sex em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como sex.

seo.titleSeo: "Sex isn't good unless it means something. It doesn't…" — Laura Sessions Stepp | Metamensagem

frase_original: Sex isn't good unless it means something. It doesn't necessarily need to mean "love" and it doesn't necessarily need to happen in a relationship, but it does need to mean intimacy and connection...There exists a very fine line between being sexually liberated and being sexually used.
